title: Parsing single Hex digits followed by ?

features.name: ternary operator with hex literal b followed by question mark
features.description: Code should include a ternary conditional expression (?:) where the condition is a hex literal ending with 'b' (e.g., 4'hb) and followed directly by ? without whitespace
features.snippet:
wire [3:0] i;
assign o = i == 4'hb ? a : b;

features.name: ternary operator with hex literal d followed by question mark
features.description: Code should include a ternary conditional expression (?:) where the condition is a hex literal ending with 'd' (e.g., 4'hd) and followed directly by ? without whitespace
features.snippet:
wire [3:0] i;
assign o = i == 4'hd ? a : b;
